solution: 
```
class Solution:
    def hasAlternatingBits(self, n: int) -> bool:
        prev_bit = n & 1
        n >>= 1
        while n:
            curr_bit = n & 1
            if curr_bit == prev_bit:
                return False
            prev_bit = curr_bit
            n >>= 1
        return True
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses bitwise operations to efficiently check the alternating bits of the given number. It iterates through the bits of the number, keeping track of the previous bit, and checks if the current bit is different from the previous one. If it finds a pair of adjacent bits with the same value, it returns False. If it iterates through all the bits without finding such a pair, it returns True.
